# Berne Appliance Repair

> Premium appliance repair company in South Florida. Same-day service across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach. $59 flat service call, 18 full-time licensed technicians. DBAs: Berne Appliance Repair · Berne Repair.

## Key facts

- Phone: (754) 345-4515 — tel:+17543454515
- Email: BerneRepair@gmail.com
- Service call: $59 flat (free if repair approved — charged only if customer declines the repair)
- Hours: 7 days/week, 7 AM – 9 PM Eastern
- Warranty: 90-day labor & parts
- Founded: 2022 — premium division of the Berne family of companies, serving South Florida since 2015
- Jobs completed: 29,000+ across the Berne family
- Rating: 4.79★ average / 871 reviews (multi-source aggregate)
- Owner: Eugene Berne
- Service area: Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County (65 cities listed in /sitemap.xml)
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Services (12)

- Refrigerator Repair — /services/refrigerator-repair
- Washer Repair — /services/washer-repair
- Dryer Repair — /services/dryer-repair
- Dishwasher Repair — /services/dishwasher-repair
- Oven & Range Repair — /services/oven-repair
- Microwave Repair — /services/microwave-repair
- Ice Maker Repair — /services/ice-maker-repair
- Wine Cooler Repair — /services/wine-cooler-repair
- Garbage Disposal Repair — /services/garbage-disposal-repair
- Air Duct Cleaning — /services/air-duct-cleaning
- Range Hood Repair — /services/range-hood-repair

## Brands serviced

Premium: Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Miele, GE Monogram.
Standard: Bosch, KitchenAid, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, GE, Maytag, Frigidaire, Electrolux, Jenn-Air, Speed Queen, Scotsman, U-Line, Marvel, and most other residential and commercial brands.

## How to reach a human

Call (754) 345-4515 (rings dispatch). Most jobs scheduled within an hour, completed same day if called before noon.

## Site structure

- /sitemap.xml — full URL list (~1700 pages including service×city combos and Spanish mirror)
- /services/{service}/{city} — combo pages for hyper-local lookup (e.g., /services/refrigerator-repair/miami)
- /es/* — Spanish mirror of every page
- /team — all 18 technicians with names, roles, photos
- /privacy — privacy policy
- /llms-full.txt — extended plain-text reference
